atomic_facts.fact: The page displays multiple technical graphs plotting variables like 'R_m' against 'Initial Spinning Speed' and 'Initial Discus-Plane Angle'.
A data table labeled 'Table 1' lists 'Spinning Speed' and 'Flight time' values.

ocr: Fig. 10(c) Effect of the initial spinning speed ω_0 on range R (K_1 = K_2 = 0.001)
Fig. 11 Effect of K_1 and K_2 on the throw range R (three curves with K_1 fixed and K_2 varying, and with K_1 = K_2 and varied together)

Fig. 12(a) Trajectory and velocity deceleration of the discus in flight (two trajectories compared for K_1 = K_2 = 0.001 and K_1 = K_2 = 0.0005; v_0 = 25.0 m/sec, θ_0 = 35.0 deg, α_0 = 0.0 deg, and ω_0 = 30.0 rad/sec)
Table 1 Throw range as affected by moment of inertia and spinning speed

Fig. 12(b) Effect of the wind velocity V_w (assumed to be equal and positive for all cases) on the trajectory and range of the discus (v_0 = 25.0 m/sec, θ_0 = 35.0 deg, α_0 = 0.0 deg, K_1 = K_2 = 0.001, and ω_0 = 30.0 rad/sec)

graph plotting R_m against INITIAL SPINNING SPEED, showing a rising curve

graph plotting R_m against RANGE, showing data points for NO-SPIN DISCUS and SPINNING DISCUS
Table 2 listing Flight times and Range for different spinning velocities
graph plotting R_m against WIND VELOCITY, showing curves for different wind angles

atomic_facts.fact: The document displays multiple scientific graphs and a data table.
Figure 10(a) shows the effect of initial spinning speed on range.
Figure 11 shows the effect of initial discus in-plane angle on range.
Figure 12 compares the trajectories of a no-spin discus and a spinning discus.
Table 2 lists flight times and ranges for spinning velocities from 0 to 14.0 rad/sec.
Figure 13 shows the effect of wind velocity on range.

ocr: Fig. 10(a) Effect of the initial spinning speed omega_0 on range R if beta_1 = beta_2
Fig. 11 Effect of beta_1 and beta_2 on the throw range R: first curves with beta_1 fixed and beta_2 varied, and with beta_2 = beta_1 and varied together
Fig. 12(a) Trajectory and attitude oscillations of the discus in flight from numerical integration...
Table 2 Throw range as affected by moment of inertia and spinning speed
Fig. 13 Effect of the wind velocity V_w relative to wind angle gamma_w on the throw range R...
